title: ECB maintains rates amid inflation concerns (Finance)
summary: The European Central Bank held interest rates steady at 4.5%, citing persistent inflation pressures in the eurozone. President Lagarde emphasized 'cautious approach' to monetary policy normalization. Banking sector stocks showed mixed reaction to the announcement.

title: Pharmaceutical breakthrough in cancer treatment (Healthcare)
summary: A new immunotherapy drug showed promising results in Phase 3 trials, with 'significant improvement in patient outcomes' according to researchers. The treatment targets aggressive forms of lung cancer. Regulatory approval is expected within 18 months.
